title: [FIRRTL] infer width (pad)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp115: UInt<21>
    tmp115 <= pad(UInt("h1c23cb"), 3)
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:12: error: destination width 21 is not greater than or equal to source width 24
    tmp115 <= pad(UInt("h1c23cb"), 3)
           ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:12: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp115, %c1844171_ui24) : (!firrtl.uint<21>, !firrtl.uint<24>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [20:0] tmp115
);
  assign tmp115 = 21'h1c23cb;
endmodule
```
